entities.name: FOXTAIL MILLET
entities.description: One of the world's oldest cultivated crops and an important staple food in southern Europe and Asia

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics used for the characterization of foxtail millet germplasm

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting foxtail millet for human use, estimated to have occurred over 4000 years ago

entities.name: CULTIVATION
entities.description: The practice of growing and managing foxtail millet

entities.name: NEOLITHIC CULTURE
entities.description: An early human culture in China for which foxtail millet was the most important food crop

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: Region where the Neolithic culture cultivated foxtail millet

entities.name: SOUTHERN EUROPE
entities.description: Region where foxtail millet is an important staple food

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where foxtail millet is an important staple food

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The wide range of genetic variation available in foxtail millet

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing cultivars, requiring the characterization of genetic resources

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and describing the traits of foxtail millet germplasm

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of grouping foxtail millet germplasm based on characterization

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources of foxtail millet conserved for research and improvement

entities.name: ICRISAT-PATANCHERU
entities.description: The facility in India where foxtail millet germplasm is conserved
